sarah.name: Sarah
sarah.response: Sarah is your youngest daughter. She loves baking chocolate chip cookies with you and calls every Sunday evening to check in.
captions: Sarah at her nursing school graduation, 2018
Sarah baking cookies with you in the kitchen, 2019
Sarah and you at Lakeview Beach, 2020
sarah.story: Sarah is your youngest daughter. She became a nurse in 2018 and still keeps your Sunday phone call tradition.

arki.name: Jack
arki.response: This is Jack, your eldest son. He built the backyard birdhouse for you years ago and now works as a carpenter.
captions: Jack building the backyard birdhouse, 1998
Jack at his wedding, 2015
Jack holding baby Emma, 2020
arki.story: Jack is your eldest son. He works as a carpenter and lives nearby with his wife, Lisa, and their daughter, Emma.

maya.name: Emma
maya.response: Emma is your granddaughter. She loves drawing, gives you handmade cards, and calls you Nana.
captions: Emma at her first birthday party, 2021
Emma drawing with you at the dining table, 2023
Emma at the neighborhood park, 2024
maya.story: Emma is Jack and Lisa's daughter. She is cheerful, creative, and always excited to show you her latest drawings.

robert.name: Robert
robert.response: Robert is your husband. You married in 1975. He loved weekend fishing, tending roses, and listening to Moon River.
captions: You and Robert on your wedding day, 1975
Robert fishing at Willow Lake, 1990
Robert in the rose garden, 2010
robert.story: Robert is your husband and lifelong partner. He is calm, funny, and always made Sunday mornings feel special.

margaret.name: Margaret
margaret.response: Margaret is your longtime quilting friend. You meet at the community center and swap recipes after class.
captions: You and Margaret at quilting circle, 2018
Margaret's birthday brunch, 2022
margaret.story: Margaret is one of your closest community friends and part of your weekly quilting group.

buddy.name: Buddy
buddy.response: Buddy is your golden retriever. He follows you around the house, loves belly rubs, and sleeps at the foot of your bed.
captions: Buddy as a puppy on adoption day, 2019
Buddy playing fetch with Emma, 2023
buddy.story: Buddy joined the family in 2019. He is gentle, loyal, and your constant companion.

dr_chen.name: Dr. Miller
dr_chen.response: You see Dr. Miller every Tuesday at 2 PM at Riverside Family Clinic. She is kind and very patient with you.
captions: Dr. Miller at Riverside Family Clinic
dr_chen.story: Dr. Miller has been your primary doctor for several years and helps keep your routine organized.

lisa.name: Lisa
lisa.response: Lisa is Jack's wife and your daughter-in-law. She teaches fourth grade and always brings lemon cake when she visits.
captions: Lisa and Jack on their wedding day, 2015
Lisa helping Emma learn to ride a bike, 2023
lisa.story: Lisa is warm, organized, and thoughtful. She keeps the family gatherings running smoothly.

uncle_joe.name: Uncle Joe
uncle_joe.response: Uncle Joe is Robert's brother. He played jazz guitar for years and still wears his signature fedora.
captions: Uncle Joe playing jazz downtown, 2005
uncle_joe.story: Uncle Joe is the family's musician and storyteller, known for live jazz nights and funny road stories.

best_friend_linda.name: Linda
best_friend_linda.response: Linda is your best friend. You have known each other for decades and talk almost every day.
captions: You and Linda at the county fair, 2017
Coffee morning with Linda, 2024
best_friend_linda.story: Linda has been your closest friend since your 20s. She drives you to appointments and never misses birthdays.

neighbor_tom.name: Tom
neighbor_tom.response: Tom is your next-door neighbor. He helps with trash day, snow shoveling, and keeps an eye on your porch.
captions: Tom fixing the mailbox post, 2022
Tom and Buddy in the front yard, 2024
neighbor_tom.story: Tom lives next door and is one of your most reliable daily helpers in the neighborhood.

mailman_mike.name: Mike
mailman_mike.response: Mike is your mail carrier. He delivers your mail around noon and always checks that your packages are safely placed.
captions: Mike delivering holiday cards, 2023
Mike dropping off a care package, 2024
mailman_mike.story: Mike has been your mailman for years. He is friendly, dependable, and knows your routine.

who bakes cookies with me?.response: Sarah bakes cookies with you. It's one of your favorite traditions together.

tell me about my dog.response: Your dog is Buddy, a golden retriever. He is affectionate, loyal, and always by your side.

when do i see the doctor?.response: You see Dr. Miller every Tuesday afternoon at 2 PM at Riverside Family Clinic.

who is my granddaughter?.response: Your granddaughter is Emma. She loves drawing and calls you Nana.

who played jazz?.response: Uncle Joe played jazz guitar and is known in the family for music nights and stories.

tell me about my husband.response: Your husband is Robert. You married in 1975, and he loved fishing, gardening, and old standards.

who is my best friend?.response: Your best friend is Linda. She has been by your side for decades and you talk almost every day.

who is my neighbor?.response: Your neighbor is Tom. He lives next door and helps with practical things like snow and trash day.

who is my mailman?.response: Your mailman is Mike. He delivers around noon and makes sure packages are safe on your porch.

who is my son?.response: Your son is Jack. He is a carpenter and built the backyard birdhouse for you.
